name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Your dinner invite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I hope we get to meet soon. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d907881b7bd8f2d963bffe6fe0b7b3bf13deef0d2f2b09d421f5691511bbeade4349c8002c4caf3504021e3de07866be3004)
---

Friend,

I'm only reaching out to my strongest supporters with this exclusive invite for a chance to have an EPIC dinner with me in one of my favorite states, Ohio.

If you win, all you have to do is choose your plus one to join us and my team will take care of:
* **Your hotel stay**
* **Your flight**
* **And your meal**

After our incredible meal, we'll get to talk in person for a bit and take a picture together to remember the moment forever. My favorite part!
---
| **[All you have to do is contribute at least $3 before March 15th at 11:59 PM to be automatically entered.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d90715c73eb3b46434351dc11e23557c9310ce047c1f56f7326fa95af45361717b2e770b2825902e7c4666526c4c48eb96cb)** **[DINNER WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d907fdb5c8ab5c4a947db69ed6c7911aeac4a29563de3c6f52bd3cef5f04d2eca16308e42750ad657d05240a37936789bc9c)** **SUPPORTER: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d9075c3c82ff73b42d5358b423c0754ba984f8413d3680cfecf52851dfdb9769213a574bb8da288d3fb25501eeea1d7c02da)** ** ENTRY: ****PENDING**
**DEADLINE: March 15th at 11:59 PM** ********************************************[ **CONTRIBUTE $3**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d90778d6d9bfaf212752d44069a94bce2b6da5c8bbf628cb8b5e2246f89e4fac761b4fa8d85e10f6e011c81dcb8a13243189)******************************************** ** [CONTRIBUTE $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d907c886cf255c8bb303672db581843b3a457589b735b8408d4182ad138af71177a8e8f24a150cf7a2e4eb5f129733399ce6)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $15](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d9075a93ab43aa18499aac5ed8d9bf8ef268d6549734a1133a9b9e634cdb050b86a3aacf7759ef3ffb9b5c452dc2633b1f7b)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d90769f1cea93efe7f8e435f913f372a83e1503c0d9895866ab010699317ce4db176c1d2bfd3dd50ff4f58be70c9d938dd6b)** ** [CONTRIBUTE $3](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d907cb4a03aae0894308938fef4718067bd6465267149f72a99c45fa814b1a21ce8356d72a0bea7e1f5798e17afb8b91c98a)** ** [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d907ea2c3cb189259cd60cf02d32afed7f927ba1be9a172408df5e731354630e46b3770e31d78b6c602ee9aa90b357ea7d48)**

Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity. I'm really the big winner here, because I get the chance to have dinner with you, Friend.

**[Just contribute as little as $3 and your name will automatically be entered.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d9073d7fa09e77c670cfda6602c7941aaf1f738d98ae1eedffd1af9b2d85cce7f8c67062cc5d0ad150584f41e71296d2d286)**

Good luck!

Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

** [CONTRIBUTE $3](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d90723993ed217641644dd95688ed4aefacaa15687b7e70f6b046db2940d342cba2f9738f69e89e25b0d052891dde251977d) **

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. **NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN.** Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking [here. ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d907ffb7854d66f98d82624b905fb19ffba7896411af34d39aa70e15ddd53f372caf4586000782ade59cf00b25fedd724538) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d90705b33280c1cc8ca347e9c20cc246a2a701f8fa141f01e85045e7cdf72fdbce0d4f47fad0234326f96e77a5ed0df39eb4) or by texting “MARCHDINNER” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between March 5, 2019, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on March 15, 2019, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to a breakfast event featuring President Donald J. Trump (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e4beb8436494d907e9b5f725e1e391a2c4f3723326d1e5fa2e3f55249fa9e8040c520fc261ea26f0e1d346d11a0258ae882455d4d18e971a) for full details and Official Rules. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

name: Greg Pence
subject: another big spending bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |
body:
The latest "election reform" bill is nothing but bad news. My colleagues across the aisle want you to think this will change the whole political game. [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=bbb35b54ef9e41fd8d8f04aaa4bbb953&_e=DAIHl3Ug_pAhQUz3SXr0nC3Yy044XFbAVaQ-VwLbCw7ig5iAcS3teeF6ZkH0Srkg6yaR4YOXLbBdTUwlPjIDpgIeN2h9BVH7GQ6SLNgH64pd6dn8ka2FYAdXikXBZnxzN37cOhiXvoc2qUguv_PKMFP6CZo7yIIfHHwUkhhL1vOt1u4fJh3SjbAWI2onmaA3rJa7FkGyGrE8bS6xEzTjyN0h04TDNL1GVRTjNlUl5IjiTZdmf2TshofyO-1bgQox1SccI-DsOhJ6PtQwxY01TJT5QDz449yBvG1GxcWAuP_3dYKm60dU-boaWwdPMAtckkf8tnMNDilAjneXojvIFWjisWbpnuyD9bzJKUX5EGl8IPcgGuJpaqtuJZwzMJxm5uCn7OZaxq13vx1IWb7FxTVh5_lnW-tlE8JqLYqI9B4%3D) | |
---
The latest "election reform" bill passed by the House is nothing but bad news.

My colleagues across the aisle want you to think this will change the whole political game, but the truth is that _**this is nothing but a political power grab designed to push an ultra-left political agenda.**_

This crooked legislation doesn't "reform" anything, it mandates a huge federal takeover of elections. It takes away state’s rights to regulate voter ID, empowers corporate interests, and sticks the American taxpayer with the bill for every politician’s expensive campaign.

Under H.R. 1, Congressional candidates could potentially receive $4.3 MILLION of taxpayer dollars to fund their campaigns! _Now, you can you see why so many liberals lined up to support the bill!_
|
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME: Stand against phony "election reform" >>** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=bbb35b54ef9e41fd8d8f04aaa4bbb953&_e=DAIHl3Ug_pAhQUz3SXr0nC3Yy044XFbAVaQ-VwLbCw7ig5iAcS3teeF6ZkH0Srkg6yaR4YOXLbBdTUwlPjIDpgIeN2h9BVH7GQ6SLNgH64pd6dn8ka2FYAdXikXBZnxzN37cOhiXvoc2qUguv_PKMFP6CZo7yIIfHHwUkhhL1vOt1u4fJh3SjbAWI2onmaA3rJa7FkGyGrE8bS6xEzTjyGenzoVyiRZiBYl1TTl1PJD_7klh92aqpbOLSe6hUv5p66_A2ZO-LY5fipWMBO2LgNzsUgV9v5qgLtM1pwJpY45ViDSvM8nS7sORmmsvQdK3COS2eifJTXsSAx9cuM40JUCgJiaLlProcJei8fdXaQNPgsnVlJKznhbiJkJKhkTpORF3eGwBCtl2jiVldh5BAiziGfhmwCU5kzyhM-le6MQ%3D)
|
---
I believe both parties should work together to create bipartisan election reform that protects each American voter, **but make NO mistake: this whole bill was developed to serve the special interests of Democrats and the outside organizations that support their Party.**

That is NOT something I can support, and I hope you join me to stand up to this expensive government takeover and reject this misleading bill:
**[https://secure.gregpencevictory.com/elections-556914](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=bbb35b54ef9e41fd8d8f04aaa4bbb953&_e=DAIHl3Ug_pAhQUz3SXr0nC3Yy044XFbAVaQ-VwLbCw7ig5iAcS3teeF6ZkH0Srkg6yaR4YOXLbBdTUwlPjIDpgIeN2h9BVH7GQ6SLNgH64pd6dn8ka2FYAdXikXBZnxzN37cOhiXvoc2qUguv_PKMFP6CZo7yIIfHHwUkhhL1vOt1u4fJh3SjbAWI2onmaA3rJa7FkGyGrE8bS6xEzTjyPVidoYfdaGNxZ5SFnfivRrptFB4nFwASDvMDkoYkrsr26BD3o5FMcvi9NrlSev_xvwZWJNNWIRsEAupOS7wv2tKPbTgUWU9F7WeHyxE1YVZOsKKJY5PqwR32vK7wRqsLJ9DRS8O5j9cl5owe-pHfOCMBfCFthNh2abAuhe0rQyVKJ0AE-q8GKv7REX-sL2935Le7aUFtDt9cep06ubkQ7E%3D)**

Americans deserve better than a Congress voting to line their own pockets.

-Greg Pence
|
---
---
---

---

| PO Box 275 Taylorsville, IN 47280 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com |

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: President Trump's job performance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We need your immediate response. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5f3eeab5fddeb77070a39d2c83dd336c6aada521b015cb8a1862fa6a9be82bce3c9cc8c86fc205b7bdc179cf60838c6b2b234f7bc7a74754)
---

_**[TRUMP 52% APPROVAL JOLTS WASHINGTON BEST IN YEARS](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5f3eeab5fddeb77054f5f18ea53cc405edf10694176132aef8607a75d2f2609d88378e0ede2814b703072200e1406f6a0e6cfae76f540ed2)**_

Friend,

President Trump's approval rating among likely voters is the highest it's has been in _**nearly 2 years!**_

After the greatest State of the Union Address in history, the near elimination of ISIS, fantastic economic numbers, and standing firm on his promise to BUILD THE WALL, it's clear President Trump is succeeding at an unprecedented rate.

Democrats and the Fake News are panicking because no matter how much they lie about President Trump's accomplishments, he just keeps _WINNING._

Let's keep the momentum going. As one of the President's top supporters he requested your immediate input on the Official 2019 Presidential Job Performance Approval Poll.

**How would you rate President Trump 's Job performance?**

**[GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5f3eeab5fddeb7702eb8680158962a8539753dfc3f4a5fa04879238637c1e3de3053aecbaedd7486c6cc5577f8caa8dfc078663dff9817f5)**
**[GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5f3eeab5fddeb7702eb8680158962a8539753dfc3f4a5fa04879238637c1e3de3053aecbaedd7486c6cc5577f8caa8dfc078663dff9817f5)**
**[OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5f3eeab5fddeb7702eb8680158962a8539753dfc3f4a5fa04879238637c1e3de3053aecbaedd7486c6cc5577f8caa8dfc078663dff9817f5)**
**[OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5f3eeab5fddeb7702eb8680158962a8539753dfc3f4a5fa04879238637c1e3de3053aecbaedd7486c6cc5577f8caa8dfc078663dff9817f5)**

Thank you for your input. We'll be sure to pass it along to President Trump.

Presidential Polling
Team Trump

**[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5f3eeab5fddeb770898a473abb052f885daae2b2d7a1442cd482737e35256b657559cd7e62dd2c7e74ea58a5631571fa4d794f7d5f065b08)**

name: Erica Bordador
subject: quick thing for this morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand 2020 Exploratory Committee
body:
Will you let Kirsten know what's on your mind?
Hey Peter,
I'm going to head out soon to sit down with Kirsten and go over responses to our March strategy survey. I didn't see your response, though, so I want to ask if you can share your thoughts now. It won't take more than a minute!
Kirsten is laser-focused on fighting for the issues that matter most to you and your loved ones--from Medicare for All to a Green New Deal. That's why it couldn't be more important for Kirsten to hear from you directly, so she can keep building this community-led campaign rooted in **your** stories, concerns and priorities.
**Will you take just a quick moment to let Kirsten know what's on your mind? It would mean so much. Here's the best link:** **[https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/priorities-survey-2](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "https://act.kirstengillibrand.com/priorities-survey-2?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk2888-su-gfp-nd")**
Thanks for taking the time. We're so grateful to have you on our team.
Erica
[Contribute](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976ad2/2ae112ef/110da1ac/357d0a44/3159335894/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI4ODgtc3UtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2888-su-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: Will you let Kirsten know what's on your mind? Hey Peter, I'm going to head out soon to sit down with Kirsten and go over responses to our March strategy survey. I didn't see your response, though, so I want to ask if you can share your thoughts now. It won't take more than a minute! Kirsten is laser-focused on fighting for the issues that matter most to you and your loved ones--from Medicare for All to a Green New Deal. That's why it couldn't be more important for Kirsten to hear from you directly, so she can keep building this community-led campaign rooted in your stories, concerns and priorities. Will you take just a quick moment to let Kirsten know what's on your mind? It would mean so much. Here's the best link: "" Thanks for taking the time. We're so grateful to have you on our team. Erica ""

name: Cynthia Cano - BetoORourke.com
subject: Beto’s news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
If you’re on the edge of your seat about Beto’s decision around a
potential 2020 run for president, you’re not alone. But since you’re
someone who supported Beto’s run for Senate, I wanted to invite you to be
first to hear Beto’s big announcement.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/be-the-first-to-know/?source=em20190309&t=1001&akid=24964%2E444211%2EwHZ4Af ]Want to be first to know about Beto’s 2020 decision? Sign up to get the
earliest possible update here -- then forward this email to your friends
and family so they can get it too.

Get the first Beto update >>

There’s been an outpouring of speculation, excitement, and support from
people across the country -- everyone eagerly waiting for the news. Many
of us are crossing our fingers and hoping that Beto has decided to run.

We know that we all accomplished so much in 2018. We built the largest
grassroots campaign of the election season. We trained and supported new
networks of people, many who’d never been involved in a political campaign
before as we opened more than 700 pop-up offices. We brought our message
of civility, decency, progress, and change to each one of the 254 counties
of Texas. We received more votes than any Democrat in the history of Texas
by uniting people across all walks of life so we could fight for a country
that’s not defined by fear and paranoia but instead by the things we want
to achieve together.

And now I’m ready for us to bring our movement to the rest of the country.
It’s the exact kind of campaign that America needs right now, and it’s why
so many of us are hoping that Beto has decided to launch a campaign for
President of the United States.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/be-the-first-to-know/?source=em20190309&t=1002&akid=24964%2E444211%2EwHZ4Af ]Sign up to get the very first Beto announcement here -- then forward
this email to everyone you know so they can be in the loop too. We don’t
want anyone to miss anything.

I’m ready for what’s next. I hope you are too.

Excited for more soon,

Cynthia Cano
Deputy Campaign Manager
2018 Beto for Texas Campaign

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20190309footer&t=1003&refcode2=24964_444211_wHZ4Af&akid=24964%2E444211%2EwHZ4Af

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=24964%2E444211%2EwHZ4Af

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
Yesterday, the President and First Lady honored the victims who were killed in Alabama after tornadoes ravaged the area last weekend. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=22627d33c9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [Trump Visits 23 Crosses for Tornado Victims](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f3ff5f84ff&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Caller_
Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump honored the victims who were killed in Alabama after tornadoes ravaged the area last weekend, Katie Jerkovich reports. “During the trip, the president and first lady stopped by a row of crosses outside the Providence Baptist Church in Opelika that had been set up in honor of the 23 people who were killed in the storm. The two stood quietly together and held hands in front of each cross.”

**Watch: [The President and First Lady visit Alabama](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9568a9c21a&e=3ee4985eea)**
---
|
---
| [Yeah, This Looks Like a Border Crisis](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d14d1ed0a1&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“More than 76,000 migrants crossed the southern border illegally last month, the highest number in 12 years. So much for all those media ‘fact checks’ arguing that there’s no emergency to justify President Trump’s wall,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “Smugglers have put [migrants] wise to how to take advantage of recent court decisions to claim asylum and remain here indefinitely.”
---
|
---
| [‘You Have to Pay With Your Body’: The Hidden Nightmare of Sexual Violence on the Border](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3623c227f9&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The New York Times_
“On America’s southern border, migrant women and girls are the victims of sexual assaults that most often go unreported, uninvestigated and unprosecuted,” Manny Fernandez reports. “The stories are many, and yet all too similar. Undocumented women making their way into American border towns have been beaten for disobeying smugglers, impregnated by strangers, coerced into prostitution, shackled to beds and trees and — in at least a handful of cases — bound with duct tape, rope or handcuffs.”
---
|
---
| [A Hot US Job Market is Coaxing People in from the Sidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2e761d1145&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Associated Press_
“A surprisingly strong burst of job growth over the past year has led many economists to wonder: Where are all the workers coming from?” Christopher Rugaber writes. “The pace of hiring in 2018 was the most robust in three years, and for a surprising reason: Many more people have decided to look for work than experts had expected.”

**New this week** : [Wage growth is the fastest it’s been since 2009](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1647c20a18&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [White House Presses Businesses to Reshape Training Efforts](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=310746d365&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
This week, President Trump hosted the first meeting of the American Workforce Policy Advisory Board, a group that includes Apple CEO Tim Cook and Lockheed Martin CEO Marillyn Hewson. “Ivanka Trump, the president’s daughter and adviser, is co-chair of the board, which aims to develop plans for how U.S. employers and the government can better train workers,” Eric Morath and Rebecca Ballhaus write.
---
|
---
| [90 Percent of Big Manufacturers High on Trump Economy, Set 4.4 Percent Growth Target](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d028659f4e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“The nation’s top manufacturers have for the ninth consecutive quarter given the Trump economy a thumbs up, setting record industry optimism of the economy and predicting positive growth unseen during the Obama administration,” Paul Bedard reports. “The past nine quarters . . . have seen record optimism, with an average of 91.8 percent of manufacturers positive about their own firm, compared to an average of 68.6 percent during the last two years of the Obama administration.”
---
|
---
| [Small Business Hiring Breaks Record](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f082dc19e&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“The great American jobs machine is still roaring,” James Freeman writes. One piece of evidence: a historic February hiring binge by U.S. small businesses. According to the latest employment report from the National Federation of Independent Business, small business job creation broke a 45-year record last month.
---
|
---
| [First Lady Visits Microsoft to Discuss Online Safety For Kids](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97b067cfb8&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Seattle Times_
On Monday, First Lady Melania Trump visited Microsoft in Washington state to learn about the company’s work on accessibility and online safety for children, Paul Roberts reports. The software giant “was the second stop in a three-city tour to promote the first lady’s ‘Be Best’ initiative, which is calling attention to child well-being, online safety and anti-bullying efforts and opioid abuse.”
---
|
---
| [Nadler’s ‘Obstruction’ Quest](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=addac948b8&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Democrats seem hell-bent on impeaching Mr. Trump, and most of the media will be cheering them on,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes. House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jerrold Nadler’s (D-NY) subpoena swarm is meant “to turn the President’s exercise of his normal constitutional powers into impeachable offenses.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0213077463&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d3263c240&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=b202b9a30d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Can you take our quick survey?
body:
Your feedback is important.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=698%2E150750%2E3Tfoby)

**Take a couple minutes to complete our survey to say which issues are most important to you.**

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_check/?source=em190309-1-120&t=2&akid=698%2E150750%2E3Tfoby)
Sisters and Brothers -
It was not that long ago that the ideas driving our campaign were considered fringe or extreme.
Raising the minimum wage to a living wage. Too radical. Guaranteeing health care to all as a right, not a privilege. Too radical. Aggressively combating climate change. Too radical. Reforming our broken criminal justice and immigration systems. Too radical. Not taking money from super PACs and the rich. Too radical.
Well, today those same ideas are supported by not only the majority of Americans, but also by many other candidates for president. That is thanks in large part to our political revolution.
Now we'd like to hear directly from you about which issues matter most to you in this campaign.
**Take a couple minutes to complete our survey to say which issues are most important to you.**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_check/?source=em190309-1-120&t=3&akid=698%2E150750%2E3Tfoby)
Make no mistake about it, this struggle is not just about defeating Donald Trump. This struggle is about taking on the incredibly powerful institutions that control the economic and political life of this country.
And while we have won some victories in recent years, our struggles have not always been successful.
So as we begin another campaign, it's important to hear directly from you about the issues that motivate you. Because at the end of the day, it is the issues that drive the success of our campaign.
[**Share which issues you care about most by taking a few minutes to take our survey.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_check/?source=em190309-1-120&t=4&akid=698%2E150750%2E3Tfoby)
Your feedback is important. Thanks for taking the time to share it with us today.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to, [unsubscribe using this link](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=698%2E150750%2E3Tfoby). But we hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=698_150750_3Tfoby&akid=698%2E150750%2E3Tfoby).

name: Bob Menendez
subject: We have the power to block it:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

President Donald Trump is disregarding the rule of law by declaring a national emergency that forces the American people to pay billions to build an ineffective border wall.

We can't let him get away with this unconstitutional power grab. That's why Democrats are fighting back.

Last week, the House voted to reject Trump's fake national emergency declaration. And now, I'm working with Democrats -- and even some Republicans -- in the Senate to block Trump's attempt to use emergency powers to fund his wall.

**[But I need to know if you're with me in the fight to put an end to the fake emergency. Stand with me and add your voice to tell Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans to oppose Trump's unconstitutional declaration.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c90/74d715b9/19f0e8f1/1f4bcb41/3081373467/VEsH/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/block-trump-s-fake-emergency?gpsid=39_73_5777&source=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+But+I+need+to+know+if+yoursquore+with+me")**

President Trump promised a wall, and now it is obvious he will do all he can to keep that promise -- even if it means overriding checks and balances to seize money that isn't his to use.

There's no emergency at the border beyond the Trump administration's cruel anti-immigrant policies of separating families, purposefully restricting admission at authorized ports of entry, and denying families the chance to present their asylum cases.

This was true before Trump's fake national emergency, and it is still true today.

**[This is a gross abuse of presidential power, and we have a chance to block it. Add your name to tell Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans to stop the national emergency right now.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c90/74d715b9/19f0e8f1/1f4bcb42/3081373467/VEsE/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/block-trump-s-fake-emergency?gpsid=39_73_5777&source=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+This+is+a+gross+abuse+of+presidential+po")**

Thank you,

Bob | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c90/74d715b9/19f0e8f1/1f4bcb43/3081373467/VEsF/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/block-trump-s-fake-emergency?gpsid=39_73_5777&source=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME")
---

PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
---

Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c90/74d715b9/19f0e8f1/1f4bcb44/3081373467/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/s/update-your-email-address?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bobmenendez&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&source=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters. Menendez for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:hello@menendezfornj.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Menendez for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Menendez for Senate on [Facebook](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c90/74d715b9/19f0e8f1/1f4bcb45/3081373467/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/MenendezForNJ/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bobmenendez&utm_content=5+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&source=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c90/74d715b9/19f0e8f1/1f4bcb46/3081373467/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/BobMenendezNJ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=bobmenendez&utm_content=6+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&source=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/page/m/74542c90/74d715b9/19f0e8f1/1f4bcb47/3081373467/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://bobmenendez.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bobmenendez&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx&source=em19_190309_emerge_engg_gq_ful_wall_BM_ettx") from Menendez for Senate emails.
clean_body: Friend, President Donald Trump is disregarding the rule of law by declaring a national emergency that forces the American people to pay billions to build an ineffective border wall. We can't let him get away with this unconstitutional power grab. That's why Democrats are fighting back. Last week, the House voted to reject Trump's fake national emergency declaration. And now, I'm working with Democrats -- and even some Republicans -- in the Senate to block Trump's attempt to use emergency powers to fund his wall. "" President Trump promised a wall, and now it is obvious he will do all he can to keep that promise -- even if it means overriding checks and balances to seize money that isn't his to use. There's no emergency at the border beyond the Trump administration's cruel anti-immigrant policies of separating families, purposefully restricting admission at authorized ports of entry, and denying families the chance to present their asylum cases. This was true before Trump's fake national emergency, and it is still true today. "" Thank you, Bob | "" PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible.
